creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
You went from 9 to 15, that's a bigger jump.

Perhaps 9-13, then 13-15 might have been smoother.

To be clear this should work?

  CREATE EXTENSION pg_trgm;

(might need to install postgressql15-contrib (or whatever version))

patch update_bacula_tables using [2] & [3]

proceed as shown in [1]

If that's the case, I'll patch bacula15-server with [2] and [3]
